form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Wagga Cge Mdn-Sw December 9 over 1300m, 0.6 len behind Undercut carrying 59kg at $1.75. On debut second in a small field at Albury Ctry Mdn November 7 over 1175m, soft track; a neck behind Go Commando with 59kg at $1.90. Hard to leave out of calculations.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 7th of 11 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind Travelon Dory carrying 58kg at $7. Second run from a spell 8th of 11 at Albury Super Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1175m, slow going 4.5 len behind Borjnord carrying 58.5kg at $26. Ready to find some form now.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded shortly after the start between Uytaahkoo and Macaverty.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Headwater out of High Gloss. At the most recent trial finished fourth at Gundagai over 1000m. SCRATCHED.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Headwater out of High Gloss. At the most recent trial finished fourth at Gundagai over 1000m. SCRATCHED.

form.formComment: At the latest run eased back early on 4th of 8 at Sapphire Coast Mdn on March 30 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Olington Lane with 58.5kg at $4.80. The run before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Goulburn Ctry Mdn on March 10 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.6 len behind Inna Zou with 57.5kg at $3.60. Better than that and is a leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 100m inconvenienced by Yes Arnie.
Lost ground at the start when bumped by Lethal Lion.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, 8th of 14 at Wagga Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Minks Written with 58.5kg at $31. Better for that experience but others look better placed.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Was at big odds at debut, 8th of 14 at Wagga Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Minks Written with 58.5kg at $31. Better for that experience but others look better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped and taken in by Air Miles.

form.formComment: Was well in the market at debut, 4th of 9 at Goulburn Ctry Mdn on March 22 over 1100m, slow going 6 len behind Brutal Belle with 58.5kg at $5. Can improve in this plain affair.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Was well in the market at debut, 4th of 9 at Goulburn Ctry Mdn on March 22 over 1100m, slow going 6 len behind Brutal Belle with 58.5kg at $5. Can improve in this plain affair.

form.formComment: At debut, ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Albury Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, slow going 2 len behind Flower Fairy carrying 56.5kg at $10. Should take the next step today and is a major player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). At debut, ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Albury Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, slow going 2 len behind Flower Fairy carrying 56.5kg at $10. Should take the next step today and is a major player.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when 2nd in a small field at Sapphire Coast Ctry Mdn-Sw on October 30 over 1000m, 0.8 len behind Sunrise Ridge with 53.5kg at $4.40. Has a wide gate but with even luck is a serious contender.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: First starter. Five-year-old mare by Kermadec out of Musaway. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 900m at Corowa March 7. Wait and see what she can do.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter. Five-year-old mare by Kermadec out of Musaway. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 900m at Corowa March 7. Wait and see what she can do.

form.formComment: First starter by Spirit Of Boom out of Licko'paint purchased for AUD $ 140,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Gold Coast Yearling Sale). Looks all set to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Spirit Of Boom out of Licko'paint purchased for AUD $ 140,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Gold Coast Yearling Sale). Looks all set to run well.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Hanseatic out of Who's Zooming Who. Seventh over 1000m in a Wagga Riverside trial on September 20. Following that eighth at Wagga in a 1000m trial on September 29. Has the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old filly making debut by Hanseatic out of Who's Zooming Who. Seventh over 1000m in a Wagga Riverside trial on September 20. Following that eighth at Wagga in a 1000m trial on September 29. Has the job ahead.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Tumut Mdn February 7 over 1400m, soft track; 10 len behind Paralia with 58kg at $2.45. First up last campaign sixth of 8 at Wagga F&M Mdn-Sw January 15 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Rita Red carrying 58kg at $3.60. Best form gives her a decent chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Resumes. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Tumut Mdn February 7 over 1400m, soft track; 10 len behind Paralia with 58kg at $2.45. First up last campaign sixth of 8 at Wagga F&M Mdn-Sw January 15 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Rita Red carrying 58kg at $3.60. Best form gives her a decent chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Bumped with Miss Pepeha shortly after jumping.
Raced greenly whilst under pressure over the final 100m.

form.formComment: At debut, ran last of 8 at Canberra Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind Pombia with 59kg at $17. Don't think he will trouble this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). At debut, ran last of 8 at Canberra Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, slow going 6 len behind Pombia with 59kg at $17. Don't think he will trouble this field.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 7th of 14 at Wagga Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Minks Written carrying 58.5kg at $51. Previously second-up eased back early on 8th of 11 at Cootamundra Mdn on October 5 over 1100m, 7 len behind Ready To Rush carrying 56kg at $12. Expecting him to struggle again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-4). Second-up. First-up after six months 7th of 14 at Wagga Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Minks Written carrying 58.5kg at $51. form.formComment: Second-up. First start 6th of 8 at Queanbeyan Ctry Mdn-Sw on December 18 over 1000m, 6 len behind Penrose carrying 57.5kg at $4.20. Returned from break raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 11 at Sapphire Coast Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1000m, slow going 5 len behind Inchyra carrying 58.5kg at $21. Others are preferred.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw November 4 over 1400m, soft track; 9 len behind Poets Artistry with 56kg at $31. On debut fifth of 10 at Echuca Mdn-Sw September 20 over 1000m, soft track; 6 len behind Unsnoozual with 57.5kg at $31. Will take great benefit from this run.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Resumes from a spell. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inclined to lay outwards while under pressure in the home straight.
Raced four-wide without cover for the majority of the event.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of 12 weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fourth of 9 at Wangaratta Mdn-Sw January 18 over 1400m, 4 len behind Organics carrying 57.5kg at $3.40. When resuming last campaign sixth of 9 at Sandown-Lakeside 2yo+ Mdn-Sw July 9 over 1200m, soft track; 2.25 len behind Double Pi with 57.5kg at $71. Has had plenty of chances but while fresh can run a cheeky race.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resumes after a break of 12 weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Has had plenty of chances but while fresh can run a cheeky race.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid in under pressure in the straight.
Commenced a three wide run from the 800m.
Raced keenly in the early and middle stages when three wide without cover.

form.formComment: At the latest run raced behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 12 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on April 3 over 1000m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Trooper carrying 52.5kg at $81. Before that second last in a small field at Cowra Ctry Mdn on March 9 over 1375m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Endless Applause carrying 56kg at $5.50. Hard to enthuse.
